title: abryanthemum edule
intro: Abryanthemum edule, also known as edible chamomile, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant's medicinal properties have been utilized for centuries, with its leaves and flowers exhibiting anti-inflammatory and calming effects, making it a natural remedy for anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Abryanthemum edule include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as is or added to other herbal remedies to enhance their effectiveness.
